hero.question: Hornets vs. Knicks
hero.prob_take: At 69.5%, the crowd is pricing the Knicks as a heavy favorite, but that +19.5 point swing in 24 hours screams reactive money chasing a narrative rather than new information. The real tell is volume at just $76K, which means this sharp move lacks conviction depth and likely corrects once the public stops piling in.

daily_take.headline: Knicks Futures Surge 20 Points. The Market's Finally Pricing Reality.
daily_take.deck: Hornets-Knicks just jumped 19.5 points to 69.5% for New York in 24 hours, signaling serious money moved in on the Knicks. This looks like smart money correcting an underpriced favorite, not overreaction to noise. The Knicks are the better team in every way that matters, so fade the volatility and ride with the consensus here.
